Company: Hall: Booth: Name of exhibit: (max. 75 characters) Description of the exhibit for the printed version: (max. 160 characters. Explain what the exhibit shows, not the organisation. Please write in a non-promotional, informative style, avoiding exclamation marks, superlatives, etc.) (Please attach your logo as EPS file to your e- mail for the printed AAS Guide.) Entry in the AAS-Guide for HANNOVER MESSE 2025 (One form per exhibit) Please return the completed form to sabine.schilling@idtwin.org by XX February. Weblink for further information on the exhibit or your organisation: (optional) Additional information for the digital AAS Guide Description of the exhibit for the digital version: (optional, max. 500 characters. Explain what the exhibit shows, not the organisation. Please write in a non-promotional, informative style, avoiding exclamation marks, superlatives, etc.) Contact information: (e-mail address, optional)
